title: Backend Software Engineer
description: Build REST APIs and backend services with Python, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS, CI/CD pipelines, and production monitoring.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Develop machine learning systems using PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, MLflow, model deployment, and model monitoring workflows.

title: Cloud Data Engineer
description: Own data pipelines and ETL jobs with Spark, PySpark, Airflow, AWS S3, Lambda, Terraform, Kubernetes, and data warehousing.

title: Analytics Engineer
description: Create dashboards and product metrics using SQL, dbt, data modeling, Tableau, Power BI, Excel, A/B testing, statistics, and data visualization.
